title: calcSOM — calcSOM
text: calculates Soil Organic Matter Pool, accounting management history. assume carbon Stocks LPJml natural vegetation starting point. use upper 30cm soil layer (0-20cm + 1/3 30-50 cm). correct carbon pools lost c-share depending climate region, using default factors IPCC Guidelines 2006 table 5.5. assume IPCC-corrected value target long-term equilibrium value soil stocks. soil decline build-slowly, assume every year, carbon pools move 15% towards new equilibrium. assumption line IPCC saying process take 20 years: assumption, 5 years 44% carbon pool gone, 10 years 80% 20 years 96%. determine carbon stock cropland soils non-cropland soils every cell. cropland area expands, carbon stock noncropland proportionally assigned cropland pool vice versa. outputs function soilc stocks cropland non-cropland. Relevant release N SOM loss also change carbon stocks per ha, relases binds N. done delta cropland soilc.
